verdict.evidence: The source states 'Puolustusministeriö lähettää lausuntokierrokselle' (present tense: sends), while the summary states 'Puolustusministeriö on lähettänyt lausuntokierrokselle' (present perfect: has sent). This shifts the temporal framing from an ongoing/announced action to a completed one. All other temporal elements (deadline 2.4.2026, conditional future forms, present-tense descriptions of current law) are faithfully preserved.
